name: Lemon-Thyme Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the first five ingredients until almost smooth.
2. With the machine running, gradually add the olive oil in a slow stream and process until smooth.
3. If the pesto is dry, mix in additional oil by spoonfuls.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
(Can be made ahead. Press plastic wrap onto surface of pesto. Cover and refrigerate up to 2 days or freeze up to 1 week. Bring to room temperature before using.)
